markets.question: Will Akshay Bhatia win the 2026 TOUR Championship?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed player who wins the 2026 TOUR Championship tournament.

If a listed player withdraws, is disqualified, does not participate or is eliminated from contention for the 2026 TOUR Championship tournament based on the official rules of the tournament, the relevant market will immediately resolve to "No".

If an unlisted player wins the 2026 TOUR Championship tournament this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by PGA Tour official tournament rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If no winner is announced by September 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be the official results published by the PGA Tour website (https://www.pgatour.com/).

Højgaard's recent runner-up at the Houston Open and top finishes at WM Phoenix and Valspar have propelled his momentum, while Straka surged to top-20 standings via a Truist Championship victory; rookie Sudarshan Yellamaraju impressed with a top-5 debut at THE PLAYERS Championship. Established stars like Collin Morikawa (29.5%) and Scottie Scheffler (22%) trail amid tighter projected starting strokes at The Georgian, as recent signature event form and months of remaining schedule keep the top-30 field race wide open.

markets.question: Will Demeke Mekonnen be the next Prime Minister of Ethiopia?

If no such Prime Minister takes office by December 31, 2028, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Ethiopia; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will the Bank of Canada announce a 50+ bps decrease at the June meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the amount of basis points the target for the overnight rate is changed by versus the level it was prior to the Bank of Canada's June 2026 meeting.

If the target for the overnight rate is changed to a level not expressed in the displayed options, the change will be rounded up to the nearest 25 basis points and will resolve to the relevant bracket. For example, if the relevant rate is increased or decreased by 12.5 basis points, it will be treated as a 25 basis point change for the purposes of resolution.

The resolution source for this market is information released by the Bank of Canada after its June 10, 2026 policy meeting, as listed on the official Bank of Canada calendar: https://www.bankofcanada.ca/core-functions/monetary-policy/key-interest-rate/#target-dates

This market may resolve as soon as the Bank of Canada's statement for their June meeting with relevant data is issued. If no statement is released by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

events.title: Bank of Canada decision in June?
events.description:
This market will resolve to the amount of basis points the target for the overnight rate is changed by versus the level it was prior to the Bank of Canada's June 2026 meeting.

If the target for the overnight rate is changed to a level not expressed in the displayed options, the change will be rounded up to the nearest 25 basis points and will resolve to the relevant bracket. For example, if the relevant rate is increased or decreased by 12.5 basis points, it will be treated as a 25 basis point change for the purposes of resolution.

The resolution source for this market is information released by the Bank of Canada after its June 10, 2026 policy meeting, as listed on the official Bank of Canada calendar: https://www.bankofcanada.ca/core-functions/monetary-policy/key-interest-rate/#target-dates

This market may resolve as soon as the Bank of Canada's statement for their June meeting with relevant data is issued. If no statement is released by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders price an 84% implied probability for no change in the Bank of Canada's policy rate at its June 10, 2026 meeting, reflecting the central bank's April 29 decision to hold the overnight target steady at 2.25% for a fourth consecutive time amid resurgent inflation pressures. March 2026 CPI accelerated to 2.4% year-over-year from 1.8% in February, driven by energy costs and potential U.S. tariffs, while employment added 14,000 jobs with unemployment steady at 6.7%. This hawkish tilt has sidelined rate-cut odds (4.0% for 25 basis points, 2.1% for 50+), with a modest 6.8% for hikes aligning with select bank forecasts for later tightening if inflation persists. Key May CPI and jobs data loom as catalysts ahead of resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Mayor Mark Sutcliffe leads Polymarket odds at 65% implied probability for the October 26, 2026 Ottawa municipal election, reflecting trader consensus on his re-election advantages including name recognition, established campaign infrastructure, and a 2022 victory amid split opposition. A Liaison Strategies poll released April 28 (conducted April 11-12) shows him ahead 46%-37% over Councillor Jeff Leiper among decided voters, but with roughly half undecided—a group that historically favors incumbents—despite sinking approvals on transit (70% disapprove), Lansdowne 2.0 redevelopment (62% view spending as inappropriate), housing affordability, and traffic. Fragmented challengers like homebuilder Alex Lawson (8.1%, eroding Sutcliffe's west-end base) and others prevent anti-incumbent consolidation, positioning Leiper (22%) as the primary alternative while Catherine McKenney (3.3%) trails post-provincial MPP win. Nominations open soon, with high undecideds signaling race fluidity.

markets.question: Will ForecastEx self-certify sports event contracts by June 30, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Which DCMs self-certify sports event contracts by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: **CFTC guidance and court rulings have opened the door for designated contract markets (DCMs) to self-certify sports event contracts.** In March 2026, the Division of Market Oversight issued an advisory urging DCMs to engage sports leagues pre-certification, secure data-sharing MOUs—like CME's with MLB—implement anti-manipulation safeguards, and use official settlement sources before listing these binary prediction market products. A Third Circuit decision in early April affirmed exclusive CFTC jurisdiction over DCM-traded sports event contracts, preempting state gambling laws and bolstering Kalshi's prior self-certifications. With the June 30 resolution approaching, traders eye potential filings from emerging DCMs amid ongoing ANPRM on prediction market rules, though CFTC can still stay listings. No major self-certifications reported in the past month.

eventMetadata.context_description: Chicago Fire FC holds trader consensus at 55% implied probability to win at home against FC Cincinnati, driven by their third-place Eastern Conference standing (17 points from nine matches) and strong recent form, including a dramatic 3-3 draw at TQL Stadium on April 18 where Hugo Cuypers scored twice. Chicago's healthier squad, bolstered by home advantage at Soldier Field, positions them as the slight favorite in this closely contested matchup, though Cincinnati's attacking threats like Evander keep the draw viable at 21.5%.

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

events.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent polls, including AtlasIntel (April 22–27) showing President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva at 46.6% and Senator Flávio Bolsonaro at 39.7% in first-round scenarios, reinforce trader consensus that Lula narrowly leads the October 4 plurality vote while Flávio secures second place for a runoff. Lula's incumbency and broad coalition sustain his edge in a fragmented field where others like Ronaldo Caiado trail at 3–6%, but Flávio's rapid gains—closing a 12-point gap since February via his father's endorsement and right-wing consolidation—elevate him to 65% implied probability for second. Lula's 20.5% for second reflects upside risk if Flávio surges further, as runoff simulations show them tied. No candidate nears 50% for outright victory.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Houston be between 84-85°F on April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the William P. Hobby Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 30 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the William P. Hobby Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/houston/KHOU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Yoon Sang-hyun win the 2026 Chungcheongnam Province gubernatorial election?
markets.description:
The Chungcheongnam Province gubernatorial election is scheduled to take place in South Korea on June 3, 2026 to elect the next governor of Chungcheongnam Province. 

This market will resolve according to the candidate that wins this election.

If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the South Korean government, specifically the National Election Commission (https://www.nec.go.kr/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Democratic Party candidate Park Soo-hyun's commanding trader consensus at 90% stems from her April 15 primary runoff victory over former Gov. Yang Seung-jo, followed by recent polls showing double-digit leads over incumbent People Power Party Gov. Kim Tae-heum—42% to 30% (TJB, Apr. 18-19) and 52% to 31% (Apr. 21-22)—in key battlegrounds like Cheonan and Asan. Her pledges for AI-driven industrial renaissance contrast Kim's stalled Daejeon integration and Bay Valley project amid national Democratic momentum. With the June 3 vote approaching, a scandal, incumbent voter turnout surge, or major policy reversal could narrow the gap, though current polling trends favor her path to victory.

markets.question: Exact Score: Wolverhampton Wanderers FC 1 - 0 Sunderland AFC?
markets.description: In the upcoming Premier League game between Wolverhampton Wanderers FC and Sunderland AFC, scheduled for May 2, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET: This market will resolve based on the final score of the Wolverhampton Wanderers FC vs. Sunderland AFC match originally scheduled for May 2, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET, considering only the result at the end of 90 minutes of regulation plus stoppage time; extra time and penalty shoot-outs are excluded. If the actual score is not one of the explicitly listed outcomes, the market resolves to "Any Other Score." If the match is postponed, the market will remain open until it is completed; if it is canceled with no make-up game, the market resolves to "0-0." The primary resolution source for this market will be the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if final official statistics are not published within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus reflects a tightly contested Premier League mid-table clash at Molineux, with evenly priced outcomes around 1-1, 0-1, and 1-0 underscoring high uncertainty in this low-scoring affair. Wolves' dismal recent form—including 3-0 and 4-0 defeats to Leeds and West Ham—clashes with Sunderland's resilient DWLWW run and earlier 2-0 home win over Wolves this season, balancing home advantage against Sunderland's solid away resilience. Mutual injury woes, including Wolves' Sam Johnstone and Matt Doherty sidelined plus Sunderland's Dan Ballard and Romaine Mundle out with hamstrings, disrupt attacks and favor stalemates or narrow margins amid both teams' defensive vulnerabilities and under 2.5 goals trends.

markets.question: Bill Clinton divorce by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton announce their intention to divorce by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

An announcement by the specified date of their intention to divorce will be sufficient for a "Yes" resolution, regardless of whether the divorce later actually occurs, or whether the actual divorce occurs outside of the timeframe of this market.

The resolution source will be statements from Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton, and their representatives, however a definitive consensus of credible media reporting may be considered.

events.title: Bill Clinton divorce by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton announce their intention to divorce by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

An announcement by the specified date of their intention to divorce will be sufficient for a "Yes" resolution, regardless of whether the divorce later actually occurs, or whether the actual divorce occurs outside of the timeframe of this market.

The resolution source will be statements from Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton, and their representatives, however a definitive consensus of credible media reporting may be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus implies a 96.5% probability against a Bill Clinton divorce announcement by June 30, driven by the complete absence of verifiable public statements, legal filings, or credible reporting on marital discord in the past 30 days. The Clintons' enduring 50-year union has weathered historical infidelity allegations, Epstein document releases, and tabloid rumors without dissolution, maintaining a public partnership post-presidency. No recent catalysts—like official separations, court proceedings, or spousal disputes—have emerged to alter this stability. Scenarios that could shift odds include sudden health events, explosive personal scandals, or unexpected legal actions, though such developments remain highly speculative given their advanced ages and low-profile status.

markets.question: Will A Just Russia – For Truth (SRZP) win the second-most seats in the next Russian parliamentary election?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Russia in September 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the second greatest number of seats in the next Russian State Duma election.

If the results are not known definitively by September 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The named parties or coalitions will be primarily ranked by the number of seats won in the specified election. If two or more parties are tied on seats, ties will be broken by the total number of valid votes received, with higher vote totals ranking higher. If parties remain tied, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the listed party abbreviations. This market will resolve to the party that occupies the second finishing position after applying this ranking.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the State Duma of the Federal Assembly of the Russian Federation.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results reported by Russian government sources such as the Central Election Commission of the Russian Federation.

Note: If a listed party contests the election as part of a jointly listed coalition with one or more parties not listed in this market, the market corresponding to the listed party will represent the coalition and will count all seats won by the coalition collectively. If two or more listed parties contest the election as a jointly listed coalition, with or without additional parties not listed in this market, the market corresponding to the party within that coalition that won the most seats in the previous election will represent the coalition and will count all seats won by the coalition collectively. If such a coalition dissolves, each market will again represent its respective party individually.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors the Communist Party of the Russian Federation (KPRF) for second-most seats in the September 2026 State Duma election at 34.5%, closely trailed by New People (NL) at 31% and Liberal Democratic Party of Russia (LDPR) at 26.5%, reflecting a tight contest among systemic opposition parties behind dominant United Russia. Recent VCIOM polls through mid-April show NL surging to 13.4% in proportional list voting intentions, overtaking LDPR (10.1%) and matching KPRF (10.9%), fueled by party conventions and Kremlin-backed promotion as a middle-class alternative amid economic pressures eroding ER support. KPRF holds an edge via historical strength in single-member districts, but regional arrests of its activists and LDPR's nationalist appeals keep the race fragmented. Separation could arise from federal party list approvals, electronic primaries, or shifts in undecided voters (10-20%) ahead of the campaign launch.

markets.question: Will the price of XRP be between $1.80 and $1.90 on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for XRP/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin reach $1,000,000 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) between November 24, 2025, 14:00 and December 31, 2026, 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

markets.question: Will FURIA win CBLOL 2026 Split 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the Campeonato Brasileiro de League of Legends (CBLOL) 2026 Split 1.

If the 2026 Split 1 is postponed after June 13, 2026 11:59 PM ET, canceled, or a winner has not been declared in this timeframe, this market will resolve to "Other".

If multiple teams are declared winner, this market will resolve in favor of the team whose listed team name comes first alphabetically.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Riot Games (https://lolesports.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Obliterated" or "Obliteration" during King Charles visit?
markets.description:
King Charles is scheduled to visit the White House from April 27 to April 30, 2026 (https://time.com/article/2026/04/01/king-charles-camilla-royal-state-visit-washington-america-trump/). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump says the listed term during his appearance at events featuring King Charles from April 27 through April 30, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

This market is explicitly about events featuring both Donald Trump and King Charles from April 27 through April 30, 2026. All such events featuring both on these dates count. Speeches, events, or comments which feature one named individual but not the other, will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the events contain a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

If this visit is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 140-159 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Tel Aviv be 27°C on April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Ben Gurion International Airport in degrees Celsius on 30 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LLBG

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Apple (AAPL) hit (LOW) $260 Week of April 27 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of April 27 2026, any 1-minute candle for Apple (AAPL) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Apple (AAPL) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.AAPL%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.AAPL%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.description: What will Apple (AAPL) hit Week of April 27 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Apple's share price has hovered between $265 and $273 during the week of April 27, closing at $267.61 on April 27 before rebounding to around $270.71 amid heightened volatility tied to tomorrow's fiscal Q2 2026 earnings release on April 30, with a conference call at 5 p.m. ET. Trader sentiment reflects optimism around resilient iPhone sales defying a global smartphone slump, AI integration progress, and record recycled materials in products, tempered by recent leadership shifts announcing Tim Cook as executive chairman and John Ternus as CEO effective September 2026. Consensus anticipates steady revenue growth, with focus on services margins and guidance; post-earnings reaction could swing the stock toward key levels like $268 or $272, ahead of WWDC in June.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Ankara be 20°C on April 29?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Esenboğa Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 29 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Esenboğa Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/tr/%C3%A7ubuk/LTAC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Official observations from the Turkish State Meteorological Service (MGM) and Esenboğa Airport station confirm Ankara's highest temperature peaked at 20°C around mid-afternoon on April 29, aligning with partly cloudy skies, light westerly winds, and declining solar insolation that capped further warming. Forecast models from MGM and international sources like AccuWeather and the UK Met Office converged on 19–22°C highs, with trader consensus reflecting this observational data amid historical April averages near 17°C. As evening cools temperatures to 16–17°C, resolution nears with final MGM reports; rare challenges could arise from a delayed secondary station reading exceeding 20°C or data revision, though cross-verified measurements make this improbable.

markets.question: Will the Republicans win the South Carolina Senate race in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 midterm South Carolina U.S. Senate election, inclusive of any run-offs.

A candidate shall be considered to represent a party in the event that he or she is the nominee of the party in question. Candidates other than the Democratic or Republican nominee (e.g., Greens, Libertarian, independent) may be added at a later date.

Candidates who run as independents will not be encompassed by the “Democrat” or “Republican” options regardless of any affiliation they may have with the party.

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same candidate. If all three sources haven’t called the race in this state for the same candidate, this market will resolve based on the official certification.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Republican Senator Lindsey Graham's strong incumbency advantage and fundraising lead—$11.6 million cash on hand versus challenger Mark Lynch's $3.3 million—bolster trader consensus favoring a Republican victory in the deep-red South Carolina Senate race, rated Solid Republican by Cook Political Report and Safe Republican by Sabato's Crystal Ball. Recent March polling shows Graham leading Lynch 41%-21% in the June 9 GOP primary despite Paul Dans' April 10 withdrawal and endorsement of Lynch, while Graham holds endorsements from Donald Trump, Tim Scott, and Governor Henry McMaster. General election polls, including a Democrat-sponsored Impact Research survey from February-March, have Graham ahead of leading Democratic contender Annie Andrews 47%-42%, underscoring limited Democratic path to victory absent major shifts before November 3.

markets.question: Will Girona qualify for the League Phase of the 2026-27 UEFA Champions League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed team clinches a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Champions League per UEFA rules. Otherwise, the associated market will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to clinch a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Champions League (e.g. they cannot mathematically achieve a Champions League place, cannot qualify through play in European or cup competitions, etc.), the associated market will resolve to "No". 

If the 2025-26 LaLiga season is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, or the teams that qualified for the 2026-27 Champions League have not been officially confirmed by UEFA within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA and/or LaLiga; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Mike Kennealy win the 2026 Massachusetts Governor Republican primary election?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the Republican Primary for Governor of Massachusetts, scheduled to take place on September 1, 2026. Resolution will be based on the overall winner of the primary, including any potential second round or run-off.

If no 2026 Massachusetts Gubernatorial Republican Primary takes place, this market will resolve to “Other.”

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement of the results from the Massachusetts Republican Party; however, an overwhelming consensus of credible reporting may suffice.

events.title: Massachusetts Governor Republican Primary Winner
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the Republican Primary for Governor of Massachusetts, scheduled to take place on September 1, 2026. Resolution will be based on the overall winner of the primary, including any potential second round or run-off.

If no 2026 Massachusetts Gubernatorial Republican Primary takes place, this market will resolve to “Other.”

eventMetadata.context_description: At the Massachusetts Republican Party's state convention over the April 26-27 weekend, biotech executive and combat veteran Mike Minogue secured the gubernatorial endorsement with a commanding 70% of delegate votes, propelling trader consensus to an 83% implied probability of winning the September Republican primary. Fellow candidate Brian Shortsleeve narrowly qualified for the primary ballot with 15.5% support, positioning him as the main challenger at 9.4%, while former Housing Secretary Mike Kennealy fell short of the 15% threshold and must now pursue signatures, reflected in his 2% odds. This endorsement provides Minogue momentum among party activists ahead of the low-turnout primary, though general election polls show incumbent Democrat Maura Healey leading all GOP contenders.

markets.question: Will Chelsea Clinton be the democratic nominee for NY-12?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the nomination for the Democratic Party to contest the NY-12 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The Democratic primary will take place on June 23, 2026.

If no nominee is announced by November 3, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democrat sources, including https://democrats.org/.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the open race to succeed retiring Rep. Jerry Nadler in New York's 12th Congressional District, trader consensus favors Assemblyman Micah Lasher at 47.5% implied probability for the June 23 Democratic primary, propelled by key endorsements from Nadler—his former aide—Gov. Kathy Hochul on April 13, and $4.3 million in super PAC spending from Michael Bloomberg, bolstering his institutional edge in this deep-blue Manhattan district spanning Midtown, Upper East and West Sides. Assemblyman Alex Bores holds at 31.5% amid a favorable internal poll released April 17 showing him near the lead once voters gain familiarity, despite $2.4 million in attacks over past Palantir ties; Jack Schlossberg trails at 21% on Kennedy name recognition and a Nancy Pelosi nod, though high undecideds (28-33% in recent surveys) keep the field fluid ahead of candidate forums like the April 15 92nd Street Y debate.

markets.question: Will Yoo Dong-soo win the 2026 Incheon mayoral election?
markets.description:
The Incheon mayoral election is scheduled to take place in Incheon, South Korea on June 3, 2026 to elect the next mayor of Incheon. 

This market will resolve according to the candidate that wins this election.

If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the South Korean government, specifically the National Election Commission (https://www.nec.go.kr/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Park Chan-dae's commanding trader consensus at 94.5% in the June 3 Incheon mayoral election stems from consistent polling leads over incumbent Yoo Jeong-bok, with recent surveys showing him ahead 34-54% to Yoo's 22-28%, amplified by Democratic Party national momentum under President Lee Jae-myung, for whom Park serves as a key lieutenant and impeachment figure against former President Yoon Suk-yeol. Park's April 22 official campaign launch highlighted AI, bio-industry, and livelihood pledges, while his assembly resignation triggered by-elections, signaling commitment. Yoo's third-term bid announcement today drew 7,000 supporters but faces headwinds from an ongoing election law violation trial and party weaknesses. Realistic challenges include Yoo consolidating conservative voters, a late Park scandal, depressed turnout in Incheon's historically low-voting districts, or national shifts before early voting begins.

events.title: NHL Vezina Trophy Winner
events.description:

If the listed player is not announced as a finalist for the 2025–26 Vezina Trophy, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the NHL. However, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Tampa Bay Lightning goaltender Andrei Vasilevskiy at 91% implied probability for the Vezina Trophy, reflecting his league-leading 39 wins, elite 2.32 GAA, .911 save percentage, and tying for the most games allowing two or fewer goals (35) during the 2025-26 regular season. The NHL's April 29 announcement naming Vasilevskiy, Ilya Sorokin, and Jeremy Swayman as finalists solidified his frontrunner status after pulling ahead in late-season polls and stats trackers, bolstered by the Lightning's strong finish. Sorokin's early lead in goals saved above expected and Swayman's .900+ save percentage consistency in 68% of starts offer realistic upset paths if GMs prioritize advanced metrics over volume wins.

markets.question: Will O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) beat quarterly earnings?
markets.description:
As of market creation, O'Reilly Automotive is estimated to release earnings on April 29, 2026. The Street consensus estimate for O'Reilly Automotive's GAAP EPS for the relevant quarter is $0.70 as of market creation. This market will resolve to "Yes" if O'Reilly Automotive reports GAAP EPS greater than $0.70 for the relevant quarter in its next quarterly earnings release. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." The resolution source will be the GAAP EPS listed in the company’s official earnings documents. 

If O'Reilly Automotive releases earnings without GAAP EPS, then the market will resolve according to the GAAP EPS figure reported by SeekingAlpha. If no such figure is published within 96h of market close (4:00:00pm ET) on the day earnings are announced, the market will resolve to “No”.

If the company does not release earnings within 45 calendar days of the estimated earnings date, this market will resolve to “No.” 

Note: Subsequent restatements, corrections, or revisions made to the initially announced GAAP EPS figure will not qualify for resolution, except in the case of obvious and immediate mistakes (e.g., fat finger errors, as with Lyft's (LYFT) earnings release in February 2024).
Note: The strike prices used in these markets are derived from SeekingAlpha estimates, and reflect the consensus of sell-side analyst estimates for GAAP EPS. 
Note: All figures will be rounded to the nearest cent using standard rounding.
Note: For the purposes of this market, IFRS EPS will be treated as GAAP EPS.
Note: For the purposes of this market, GAAP EPS refers to diluted GAAP EPS, unless this is not published, in which case it refers to basic GAAP EPS.
Note: All figures are expressed in USD, unless otherwise indicated.
Note: For primarily internationally listed companies, this market refers specifically to the shares traded in the United States on U.S. stock exchanges such as the NYSE or Nasdaq. In cases where the company trades in the U.S. through an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) or American Depositary Share (ADS), this market will refer to the ADR/ADS.

markets.question: Map Handicap: GH (-1.5) vs ODDIK Academy (+1.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Game Hunters and ODDIK Academy in the CCT South America Series #1 Group Stage, initially scheduled for April 28 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Game Hunters" if Game Hunters wins 2 or more maps than ODDIK Academy in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "ODDIK Academy". 

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
markets.groupItemTitle: Map Handicap: GH (-1.5) vs ODDIK Academy (+1.5)

events.title: Counter-Strike: Game Hunters vs ODDIK Academy (BO3) - CCT South America Series #1 Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Game Hunters and ODDIK Academy in the CCT South America Series #1 Group Stage, initially scheduled for April 28 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Game Hunters" if Game Hunters win the match against ODDIK Academy.

This market will resolve to "ODDIK Academy" if ODDIK Academy win the match against Game Hunters.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Game Hunters, HLTV-ranked #134, entered the CCT South America Series #1 Swiss group stage BO3 matchup against unranked ODDIK Academy with shaky recent form, posting a 3-7 record over their last 10 matches including 0-2 losses to ShindeN and Imperial within the past 48 hours, plus a lopsided 4-13 defeat to Bounty Hunters on April 25. Roster stability improved after prt's April 8 departure, with core abr, nyezin, bnc, and bsd intact. ODDIK Academy's lineup of Ceruttera, PremiuM, jvZ, and max remains unchanged since March, though inactive since late 2025; affiliated ODDIK squad beat Game Hunters 2-0 on April 2. Top 8 advance to playoffs in the $15,000 event through May 10.

markets.question: Spread: New York Mets (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLB game between the Washington Nationals and New York Mets, scheduled for April 29 at 7:10 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "New York Mets" if the New York Mets win the game by 2 or more runs.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Washington Nationals". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Washington Nationals".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

To know when a postponed game will be played, please check the home team's schedule on MLB.com for the listed team and look for the game described as a makeup game.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Washington Nationals vs. New York Mets
events.description:

This market will resolve to "Washington Nationals" if the Washington Nationals win the game.

This market will resolve to "New York Mets" if the New York Mets win the game.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, or ends in a tie, this market will resolve 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: The New York Mets gained momentum with an 8-0 shutout victory over the Washington Nationals in Monday's series opener at Citi Field, snapping a slump behind Juan Soto's homer, Bo Bichette's blast, and a 7-run fourth inning fueled by Clay Holmes' pitching. Tuesday's matchup pits Nationals righty Cade Cavalli (0-1, 4.01 ERA over 24.2 innings) against Mets lefty David Peterson (0-3, 5.06 ERA in 26.2 innings), with both squads navigating injuries—Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor sidelined by a calf strain requiring a boot, Nationals missing pitchers like Josiah Gray (flexor) and Clayton Beeter (forearm). Mets enjoy home-field advantage and a 6-4 edge in the last 10 head-to-heads, while Nationals sit around 13-16 early in the season.

markets.question: Ayo Dosunmu: Points O/U 19.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for April 30 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Ayo Dosunmu scores more than 19.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Ayo Dosunmu scores 19.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Nuggets vs. Timberwolves
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for April 30 at 12:00AM ET:
If the Nuggets win, the market will resolve to "Nuggets".
If the Timberwolves win, the market will resolve to "Timberwolves".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Minnesota Timberwolves hold a 3-2 series lead over the Denver Nuggets in their Western Conference first-round playoff matchup, but trader consensus has shifted following Minnesota's devastating backcourt injuries: star Anthony Edwards sidelined with a left knee bruise expected to miss multiple weeks, and Donte DiVincenzo out after right Achilles surgery. Denver capitalized in Game 5 with a 125-113 road rout, powered by Nikola Jokić's 27-point triple-double (16 rebounds, 12 assists), despite Aaron Gordon (calf) and Peyton Watson (hamstring) remaining out per injury reports. Game 6 looms Thursday in Minnesota, where home-court advantage and the Nuggets' signature comeback history could test the depleted Wolves' defense.

The special election for the seat for New Jersey's 11th congressional district in the U.S. House of Representatives is currently scheduled to take place on April 16, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the margin of victory between the top two candidates in the specified election.

For the purpose of this market, the “margin of victory” is defined as the absolute difference between the percentages of valid votes received by the first-place and second-place candidates. Percentages of the valid votes received by each candidate will be determined by dividing the total number of valid votes each of the top two candidates receives by the sum of all valid votes cast in the election.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher placed bracket.

If two or more candidates tie for the most valid votes in this election, and the tie is between two candidates listed, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the candidate whose listed last name comes first in alphabetical order. If the tie is between a listed candidate and an unlisted candidate, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the listed candidate. If the tie is between two or more unlisted candidates, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the official vote count once the count has been made official.

If the results of the specified election are not known definitively by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official sources, including https://www.nj.gov/state/.

If a recount is initiated before the vote total has been made official, the market will remain open until the recount is completed and the vote is made official.

eventMetadata.context_description: Democrat Analilia Mejia's commanding 94% trader consensus for a 20-25% margin of victory in the NJ-11 special election stems from unofficial election night results on April 16 showing her defeating Republican Joe Hathaway by approximately 22 points in the safely Democratic district vacated by Gov. Mikie Sherrill. Pre-election internal polling in March indicated a strong lead, fueled by progressive endorsements from figures like Bernie Sanders and AOC, robust labor support, and high Democratic turnout in this low-turnout contest amid suburban shifts toward Democrats since Sherrill's 2018 flip. The district's entrenched D+10 lean, evidenced by historical polling averages, solidified expectations of a comfortable win. While official canvassing by county boards and provisional ballot counts remain, a shift below 20% would require improbable surges in outstanding votes; certification deadlines could still introduce minor adjustments via recounts or challenges.

Alcaraz's recent right wrist injury withdrawal from the Grand Slam, alongside skips in Madrid and Rome, has cleared Sinner's path as World No. 1. Over the past week, Obama's X post responding to the April 25 White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting—which prompted partisan criticism but no legal repercussions—and his April 18 Bronx childcare center visit with NYC Mayor Mamdani represent routine public engagements, far from triggering events. Unsubstantiated rumors of back-channel diplomacy or arrests lack primary confirmation, while Obama Foundation milestones like the June 19 Presidential Center opening sustain his low-drama profile amid 2026 midterm positioning. Absent late-breaking legal developments, structural barriers to "Something" remain high.

eventMetadata.context_description: Lakers hold a commanding 3-1 series lead over the Rockets in their Western Conference first-round playoff matchup, with Game 5 set for tonight at Crypto.com Arena, fueling trader consensus toward LA's advancement despite mutual injury challenges. Houston's Kevin Durant is officially ruled out with a left ankle sprain, missing consecutive games and crippling their scoring punch after a gritty 112-108 Game 3 loss. Lakers' Luka Doncic remains sidelined by a hamstring strain, but Austin Reaves is questionable with an oblique issue—sources indicate optimism for his return to complement LeBron James, who's managed a chronic ankle tweak effectively amid recent strong play. Home-court edge and depth position LA favorably in this elimination spot for Houston.

markets.description:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Boreham Wood FC and Forest Green Rovers FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on thenationalleague.org.uk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Both sides secured strong final-day results on April 25—Boreham Wood edging Sutton United 1-0 to lock in 4th place, while Forest Green thrashed Morecambe 5-0 to clinch 7th and a play-off spot. Boreham Wood boast robust home form with four wins in their last six league games at Meadow Park, though the teams drew 1-1 there in February amid Forest Green's improved momentum. Head-to-head favors Forest Green overall (4 wins to 1), but no major injury news has emerged, heightening the stakes in this promotion push.

markets.question: Will Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) hit (LOW) $300 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.TSLA%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.TSLA%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

eventMetadata.context_description: Tesla shares trade near $379 after Q1 2026 earnings on April 22 beat adjusted EPS estimates at $0.41 versus $0.37 expected, though revenue of $22.39 billion slightly missed amid the weakest quarterly deliveries in a year, down year-over-year. YTD performance lags at -16%, pressured by thinning auto margins, 2026 capex guidance exceeding $25 billion for autonomy and AI scaling, and delayed Robotaxi monetization despite FSD 14.3 rollout and Cybercab production initiation. Energy storage growth provides offset, but trader consensus weighs unsupervised fleet expansion against high forward P/E. Watch Q2 production data and macroeconomic rate shifts through May end, as Tesla's ~$1.2 trillion market cap amplifies volatility.

markets.question: Will Republicanos (REPUBLICANOS) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Brazilian Senate election. 

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus overwhelmingly favors Partido Liberal (PL) to win the most seats in Brazil's October 4, 2026, Senate election, where 54 of 81 seats (two per state) renew amid staggered eight-year terms. Recent state-level polls, including Quaest (late April) and Vox Brasil (April 22–25), show PL candidates leading or competitive in key states like Distrito Federal (Michelle Bolsonaro), Rio de Janeiro (Cláudio Castro), and São Paulo (Guilherme Derrite), while competitive elsewhere. PL's growth to the Senate's largest bancada (15 seats) via January 2026 defections, coupled with Flávio Bolsonaro's statistical tie against President Lula in the April 28 AtlasIntel/Bloomberg presidential poll, drives right-wing momentum. PODEMOS leads in Amapá; NOVO tops Paraná; uncertainties persist in battlegrounds like Bahia and Rio Grande do Sul.

eventMetadata.context_description: New York Liberty lead trader consensus at 34% implied probability to win the 2026 WNBA championship after a stellar offseason, signing All-Star forward Satou Sabally to join a re-signed Big Three core of Breanna Stewart, Sabrina Ionescu, and Jonquel Jones for unmatched frontcourt depth and scoring versatility. Indiana Fever sit at 20.5% buoyed by Aliyah Boston's extension through 2029, Kelsey Mitchell's supermax re-signing, and defensive additions like Raven Johnson, building around Caitlin Clark's MVP-caliber play. Defending 2025 champions Las Vegas Aces hold 15% with A'ja Wilson's dominance and core retention including Jackie Young, though quieter moves temper expectations. Atlanta Dream's 12.5% reflects acquiring Angel Reese cheaply and locking in Rhyne Howard plus Allisha Gray long-term, while Golden State Valkyries' 12% stems from Gabby Williams' defensive boost in Year Two; Minnesota Lynx slipped to 11% amid key departures and Napheesa Collier's ankle surgery sidelining her until June, with Seattle Storm at 10.5% embracing a youth rebuild via top draft picks Awa Fam Thiam and Flau'jae Johnson post-expansion draft and free agency frenzies.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vegas Golden Knights hold a trader consensus 59.5% implied probability to win their first-round Stanley Cup Playoffs series against the Utah Mammoth, tied 2-2 heading into Game 5 at T-Mobile Arena with home-ice advantage for Games 5 and 7. The Knights' gritty 5-4 overtime victory in Game 4 on April 27—capped by Shea Theodore's late winner after Brett Howden's two goals—demonstrates their playoff resilience and depth despite missing center William Karlsson (lower body). Utah's goaltender Karel Vejmelka shone with 30 saves in their Game 3 home win, but Vegas' experience as recent Stanley Cup champions, superior road record in the series, and stars like Jack Eichel give them the edge in this closely contested matchup. Mammoth center Barrett Hayton remains out (upper body).

markets.question: Will Apple (AAPL) close above $220 end of April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official closing price for Apple (AAPL) on the final trading day of April 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If the final trading day of the month is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

If no official closing price is published for that session (for example, due to a trading halt into the close, system issue, or other disruption), the market will use the last valid on-exchange trade price of the regular session as the effective closing price.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance — specifically, the Apple (AAPL) "Close" prices available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL/history, published under "Historical Prices."

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Yahoo Finance.

markets.question: Will Benfica finish 2nd in the Primeira Liga for the 2025-26 season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club finishes 2nd in the final standings of the 2025-2026 Primeira Liga season. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve to the team officially recognized by Primeira Liga as finishing in second place. If multiple teams are officially awarded second place, the market will resolve to the team whose listed name comes first alphabetically.

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to finish 2nd in the 2025-2026 Primeira Liga season (e.g. they are mathematically unable to achieve enough points), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025-2026 Primeira Liga season is cancelled, postponed after June 7, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no 2nd place team declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Primeira Liga. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Israel x Hamas ceasefire cancelled by June 30?
markets.description:
On October 9, 2025 Israel and Hamas signed a deal implementing a ceasefire: https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/israel-hamas-agree-gaza-ceasefire-return-hostages-2025-10-09/

This market will resolve to "Yes" if a either Israel or Hamas announce the cancellation of the ongoing ceasefire, or if a consensus of credible reporting confirms that the ceasefire is no longer in effect, by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise this market will resolve to "No".

Announcements that one side or another violated the ongoing ceasefire will not be enough to resolve this market to "Yes"; only a definitive announcement by Israel or Hamas, or otherwise a wide consensus of credible reporting that that the ceasefire has been ended, will qualify to resolve this market to "Yes".

eventMetadata.context_description: The Gaza ceasefire, in effect since October 2025, hangs in precarious balance amid escalating mutual violations and stalled phase-two negotiations. Hamas rejected the peace plan's disarmament clause on April 16—essential for transitioning beyond the first phase—while the IDF reported 14 breaches by the group from April 8-16; Israeli airstrikes killed at least 12 Palestinians on April 24 despite truce terms. Six months on, aid inflows lag commitments, no comprehensive withdrawal has occurred, and clashes persist in a "neither war nor peace" limbo. Mediators including the U.S. urge compliance, but hardening positions on security and governance raise escalation risks ahead of potential June deadlines.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 120-139 tweets from May 1 to May 8, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from May 1 12:00 PM ET to May 8, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will monthly inflation increase by ≥1.1% in April?
markets.description:
This is a market about the one-month percent change in the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS).

This market will resolve to the one-month percent change in the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) in April 2026 according to the monthly BLS report.

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm), currently scheduled to be released on May 12, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) which BLS reports to one decimal point (e.g. 0.4%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the BLS does not release the relevant figures on the scheduled date, this market may remain open up until the scheduled release time of the next CPI report (https://www.bls.gov/schedule). If the information is not released by that time, this market will resolve according to the figures of the most recent previous month with available data.

Core pressures remain sticky amid elevated services and shelter costs, while Cleveland Fed nowcasts point to 3.56% year-over-year headline for April, tempering disinflation bets. markets.question: Game Handicap: TEX (-2.5) vs Toronto KOI (+2.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Call of Duty match between Toronto KOI and OpTic Texas in the Call of Duty League Stage 3 Major Qualifiers Qualifiers, initially scheduled for May 2 at 7:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "OpTic Texas" if OpTic Texas wins 3 or more games than Toronto KOI in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Toronto KOI". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
markets.groupItemTitle: Game Handicap: TEX (-2.5) vs Toronto KOI (+2.5)

events.title: Call of Duty: Toronto KOI vs OpTic Texas (BO5) - Call of Duty League Stage 3 Major Qualifiers Qualifiers
events.description:
This market refers to the Call of Duty match between Toronto KOI and OpTic Texas in the Call of Duty League Stage 3 Major Qualifiers Qualifiers, initially scheduled for May 2 at 7:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Toronto KOI" if Toronto KOI win the match against OpTic Texas.

This market will resolve to "OpTic Texas" if OpTic Texas win the match against Toronto KOI.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: OpTic Texas holds a dominant edge over Toronto KOI in recent head-to-heads, sweeping their last six series 0-6 with a 18-2 map advantage, capped by a 3-1 elimination win in the CDL Minor I tournament on April 25 where Mercules and Shotzzy delivered hardpoint masterclasses on maps like Scar and Den. Both teams entered Stage 3 Major Qualifiers strongly—Toronto KOI at 2-0 (6-2 map record) after wins over Riyadh Falcons and others, OpTic Texas 1-0 (3-1)—fueled by stable rosters featuring Shotzzy, Dashy, Huke, and Mercules for Texas, and Insight, CleanX, JoeDeceives, Kips for KOI. Recent scrims showed competitiveness (e.g., 4-3, 5-5 map splits), but trader consensus reflects Texas' superior form, meta adaptation on Black Ops 6 maps like Gridlock and Exposure, and momentum heading into this BO5 qualifier bracket match.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Austin-Bergstrom International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/austin/KAUS.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors 80-81°F (95.3% implied probability) for Austin's highest temperature today at Austin-Bergstrom International Airport, driven by the National Weather Service's latest morning forecast projecting a daytime peak in that range under mostly cloudy skies and likely afternoon thunderstorms. Current observations show upper 70s°F by late morning amid overcast conditions, high humidity near 90%, and a level 2/5 severe weather risk featuring damaging winds and hail, which will suppress solar heating via cloud cover and precipitation. This aligns with April climatological averages around 80°F and model consensus on a weakening cold front steering storms into the area. Realistic challenges include prolonged clearing for a push to 82°F+ or earlier heavy rain cooling below 80°F; monitor NWS hourly updates and KAUS observations through afternoon.

markets.question: Will Nolan McLean win the 2026 NL Cy Young Award?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 National League Cy Young Award.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Major League Baseball; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: MLB: 2026 NL Cy Young Winner
events.description:

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.
